title: The National Commission for Minority Educational Institutes Act, 2004
full_text: The National Commission for Minority Educational Institutes Act, 2004 राष्‍ट्रीय अल्‍पसंख्‍यक शैक्षणिक संस्‍थाआयोग अधिनियम, 2004 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 200502 Act Number: 02 Enactment Date: 2005-01-06 Act Year: 2005 Short Title: The National Commission for Minority Educational Institutes Act, 2004 Hindi Title: राष्‍ट्रीय अल्‍पसंख्‍यक शैक्षणिक संस्‍थाआयोग अधिनियम, 2004 Long Title: An Act to constitute a National Commission for Minority Educational Institutions and to provide for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Education Department: Department of Higher Education Enforcement Date: 11-11-2004 Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles Show all section The National Commission for Minority Educational Institutes Act, 2004 CHAPTER I PRELIMINARY CHAPTER II THE NATIONAL COMMISSION FOR MINORITY EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS CHAPTER III RIGHTS OF A MINORITY EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTION CHAPTER IV FUNCTIONS AND POWERS OF COMMISSION CHAPTER V FINANCE, ACCOUNTS AND AUDIT CHAPTER VI MISCELLANEOUS Section 1. Short title, extent and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Show Related Subordinates Section 3. Constitution of National Commission for Minority Educational Institutions. Show Related Subordinates Section 4. Qualifications for appointment as Chairperson or other member. Show Related Subordinates Section 5. Term of office and conditions of service of Chairperson and Members. Show Related Subordinates Section 6. Officers and other employees of Commission. Section 7. Salaries and allowances to be paid out of grants. Section 8. Vacancies, etc., not to invalidate proceedings of Commission. Section 9. Procedure to be regulated by Commission. Section 10. Right to establish a Minority Educational Institution. Section 10A. Right of a Minority Educational Institution to seek affiliation. Section 11. Functions of Commission. Section 12. Powers of Commission. Section 12A. Appeal against orders of the Competent authority. Show Related Subordinates Section 12B. Power of Commission to decide on the minority status of an educational institution. Section 12C. Power to cancel. Section 12D. Power of Commission to investigate matters relating to deprivation of educational rights of minorities. Section 12E. Power of Commission to call for information, etc. Section 12F. Bar of jurisdiction. Section 13. Financial and administrative powers of Chairperson. Show Related Subordinates Section 14. Grants by Central Government. Section 15. Accounts and audit. Show Related Subordinates Section 16. Annual report. Show Related Subordinates Section 17. Annual report and audit report to be laid before Parliament. Section 18. [Omitted.]. Section 19. Chairperson, Members, Secretary, employees, etc., of Commission to be public servants. Show Related Subordinates Section 20. Directions by Central Government. Section 21. Protection of action taken in good faith. Section 22. Act to have overriding effect. Section 23. Returns or information. Section 24. Power to make rules. Section 25. Power to remove difficulties. Section 26. Repeal and saving. Schedule 1.
